mapper.sql: SELECT id, project_id, `release`, dist, artifact, artifact_hash, file_name, file_size, source_map_json, create_time, update_time FROM monitor_source_map_artifact
mapper.update: UPDATE monitor_source_map_artifact SET dist = #{dist}, artifact_hash = #{artifactHash}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_size = #{fileSize}, source_map_json = #{sourceMapJson} WHERE id = #{id}
